scripts.test: npm run build -w gizmo-core && npm run test -w gizmo-core && npm run build -w four-rotation && npm run test -w four-rotation && npm run build -w four-camera && npm run test -w four-camera && npm run build -w four-camera-three && npm run test -w four-camera-three && npm run test -w wallpaper-tesseract
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w gizmo-core && npm run typecheck -w four-rotation && npm run build -w four-rotation && npm run typecheck -w four-camera && npm run build -w four-camera && npm run typecheck -w four-camera-three && npm run build -w four-camera-three && npm run typecheck -w wallpaper-tesseract
scripts.build: npm run build -w gizmo-core && npm run build -w four-rotation && npm run build -w four-camera && npm run build -w four-camera-three && npm run build -w wallpaper-tesseract
